description_long: This is a modern, box-shaped house surrounded by lush, leafy trees with pink blossoms, creating a natural, secluded setting. The house features a flat roof and a minimalist white facade, accented by large windows and a few wooden panels. The structure appears to be two stories tall, with the upper level slightly set back and featuring a balcony or terrace area. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some large panes providing ample natural light and views of the surrounding greenery. The main entryway is simple, with a single door and no prominent porch or steps, blending seamlessly into the clean lines of the building. The landscaping is dominated by mature trees, which partially obscure the house and enhance its sense of privacy.
description: A modern, two-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, and wooden accents, surrounded by dense pink-blossomed trees. The minimalist design and lush landscaping create a private, contemporary residence.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house partially obscured by trees, with the flat roof and a glimpse of the interior visible, highlighting the open, airy design.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the main facade with the entry door, large windows, and a wooden accent panel, framed by flowering trees.
description_view_2: View 2 reveals the side of the house with more windows and a clear view of the balcony or terrace, surrounded by dense foliage.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the rear of the house, featuring additional wooden panels and a more private, enclosed aspect due to the surrounding trees.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple flush door with no porch or steps, minimalistic and integrated into the facade
